Package io.github.bbobbogi.stream4j.common

Interface PlatformChatEventListener

public interface PlatformChatEventListener
Common listener interface for platform chat events.

Each platform-specific chat listener extends this interface.

Since:
1.0.0

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default void
    onBroadcastEnd(PlatformChat chat)
    Called when the platform reports that the broadcast has ended.
    default void
    onConnect(PlatformChat chat, boolean isReconnecting)
    Called when a chat connection is established.
    default void
    onConnectionClosed(int code, String reason, boolean remote, boolean tryingToReconnect)
    Called when a chat connection is closed.
    default void
    onError(Exception ex)
    Called when an exception is raised by chat processing.
    default void
    onUnhandledEvent(String eventName, String rawData)
    Called for platform events that are not handled by dedicated callbacks.

  • Method Details

    • onConnect

      default void onConnect(PlatformChat chat, boolean isReconnecting)
      Called when a chat connection is established.
      Parameters:
      chat - connected chat instance
      isReconnecting - whether this connect event is part of a reconnect

    • onConnectionClosed

      default void onConnectionClosed(int code, String reason, boolean remote, boolean tryingToReconnect)
      Called when a chat connection is closed.
      Parameters:
      code - close status code
      reason - close reason text, may be null
      remote - whether the remote side closed the connection
      tryingToReconnect - whether reconnect will be attempted

    • onBroadcastEnd

      default void onBroadcastEnd(PlatformChat chat)
      Called when the platform reports that the broadcast has ended.
      Parameters:
      chat - chat instance that observed broadcast end

    • onError

      default void onError(Exception ex)
      Called when an exception is raised by chat processing.
      Parameters:
      ex - thrown exception

    • onUnhandledEvent

      default void onUnhandledEvent(String eventName, String rawData)
      Called for platform events that are not handled by dedicated callbacks.
      Parameters:
      eventName - platform event name
      rawData - raw event payload
